title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal direct risk as described, but improper use or reliance on it without proper validation may lead to missed vulnerabilities or false positives. Additionally, if the tool is not well-maintained, it could become a vector for supply chain attacks.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's credibility and review its source code before integrating it into your security workflows.
Use the tool as a supplementary measure alongside established vulnerability management processes.
Monitor the tool's updates and community feedback to ensure it remains secure and effective.

title: UltraJSON has an integer overflow handling large indent leads to buffer overflow or infinite loop
description:
### Summary

`ujson.dumps()` crashes the Python interpreter (segmentation fault) when the product of the `indent` parameter and the nested depth of the input exceeds INT32_MAX. It can also get stuck in an infinite loop if the `indent` is a large negative number. Both are caused by an integer overflow/underflow whilst calculating how much memory to reserve for indentation. And both can be used to achieve denial of service.

(Note: A negative indent to `ujson` means add spaces after colons but do

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32875.

title: UltraJSON has a Memory Leak parsing large integers allows DoS
description:
#### Summary

ujson 5.4.0 to 5.11.0 inclusive contain an accumulating memory leak in JSON parsing _large_ (outside of the range [-2^63, 2^64 - 1]) integers.

#### Exploitability

Any service that calls `ujson.load()`/`ujson.loads()`/`ujson.decode()` on untrusted inputs is affected and vulnerable to denial of service attacks.

#### Details

The leaked memory is a copy of the string form of the integer plus an additional NULL byte. The leak occurs irrespective of whether the integer parses success

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The memory leak in UltraJSON when parsing large integers can lead to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks by exhausting system memory, potentially causing service outages for applications relying on ujson for JSON parsing.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to a patched version of UltraJSON once available or switch to an alternative JSON parsing library that is not vulnerable.
Implement input validation to restrict the range of integers processed by ujson and avoid parsing untrusted inputs.
Monitor memory usage of services using ujson and set alerts for abnormal behavior to detect potential exploitation.

title: Heimdall: Path received via Envoy gRPC corrupted when containing query string
description:
### Summary
When using heimdall in envoy gRPC decision API mode, wrong encoding of the query URL string allows rules with non-wildcard path expressions to be bypassed.

The HTTP based decision API is NOT affected, and proxy mode is NOT affected either.

**Note:** The issue can only lead to unintended access if heimdall is configured with an "allow all" default rule. Since v0.16.0, heimdall enforces secure defaults and refuses to start with such a configuration unless this enforcement is explicit

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32811.

title: Denial of service in github.com/jackc/pgproto3/v2
description: The DataRow.Decode function fails to properly validate field lengths. A malicious or compromised PostgreSQL server can send a DataRow message with a negative field length, causing a slice bounds out of range panic.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the DataRow.Decode function can be exploited by a malicious or compromised PostgreSQL server to cause a denial of service (DoS) by triggering a panic in the application. This can disrupt services relying on the affected library, potentially leading to downtime or degraded functionality.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of github.com/jackc/pgproto3/v2 that addresses this vulnerability, if available.
Implement strict validation and sanitization of data received from PostgreSQL servers to mitigate potential exploitation.
Ensure that PostgreSQL servers interacting with the application are trusted and secured to reduce the risk of malicious activity.

title: Denial of service in github.com/buger/jsonparser
description: The Delete function fails to properly validate offsets when processing malformed JSON input. This can lead to a negative slice index and a runtime panic, allowing a denial of service attack.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Delete function of the jsonparser library can be exploited to cause a runtime panic through malformed JSON input, resulting in a denial of service. This could disrupt applications relying on the library for JSON processing, potentially leading to downtime or degraded service.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to the latest patched version of the jsonparser library if available, or apply any recommended mitigations from the library maintainers.
Conduct a code audit to identify and mitigate any instances where untrusted or external JSON input is processed using the vulnerable Delete function.
Implement input validation and sanitization mechanisms to handle malformed JSON data before passing it to the library.

title: Denial of service in github.com/shamaton/msgpack
description: The msgpack decoder fails to properly validate the input buffer length when processing truncated fixext data (format codes 0xd4-0xd8). This can lead to an out-of-bounds read and a runtime panic, allowing a denial of service attack.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: SSRF in @aborruso/ckan-mcp-server via base_url allows access to internal networks
description:
## Summary

The `@aborruso/ckan-mcp-server` MCP server provides tools including `ckan_package_search` and `sparql_query` that accept a `base_url` parameter, making HTTP requests to arbitrary endpoints without restriction. A CKAN portal client has no legitimate reason to contact cloud metadata or internal network services.

## Severity

Attack complexity is HIGH because exploitation requires prompt injection via malicious content (webpage, document) while the victim's AI assistant has this MCP se

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-33060.

title: SQL Injection via unsanitized JSON path keys when ignoring/silencing compilation errors or using `Kysely<any>`.
description:
### Summary

Kysely through 0.28.11 has a SQL injection vulnerability in JSON path compilation for MySQL and SQLite dialects. The `visitJSONPathLeg()` function appends user-controlled values from `.key()` and `.at()` directly into single-quoted JSON path string literals (`'$.key'`) without escaping single quotes. An attacker can break out of the JSON path string context and inject arbitrary SQL.

This is inconsistent with `sanitizeIdentifier()`, which properly doubles delimiter characters for id

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32763.

title: File Browser has an Authorization Policy Bypass in Public Share Download Flow
description:
### Summary
A permission enforcement flaw allows users without download privileges (`download=false`) to still expose and retrieve file content via public share links when they retain share privileges (`share=true`). This bypasses intended access control policy and enables unauthorized data exfiltration to unauthenticated users. Where download restrictions are used for data-loss prevention or role separation.

### Details
The backend applies inconsistent authorization checks across download path

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthorized users to bypass download restrictions and access sensitive files via public share links. This could lead to data exfiltration, exposing confidential or proprietary information, and violating data privacy regulations.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-32761.
Review and audit all public share links to ensure sensitive files are not exposed and revoke unnecessary sharing permissions.
Implement additional monitoring and logging to detect unauthorized file access or downloads.

title: Terraform Provider for ArgoCD has possible exposure to GO-2026-4337 / CVE-2025-68121
description:
### Summary
The terraform-provider-argocd might have been vulnerable to GO-2026-4337 / CVE-2025-68121 ("Unexpected session resumption in crypto/tls").

### Details

See https://pkg.go.dev/vuln/GO-2026-4337 for the upstream vulnerability.

Provider versions starting with `v7.15.1` are using `go 1.25.8` for building and are thus no longer affected.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Terraform Provider for ArgoCD could allow unexpected session resumption in crypto/tls, potentially exposing sensitive data or enabling unauthorized access. This could compromise the security of infrastructure-as-code deployments.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to terraform-provider-argocd version v7.15.1 or higher, which uses go 1.25.8 and is no longer affected.
Audit existing deployments for signs of unauthorized access or data exposure.
Monitor upstream vulnerability advisories for further updates or patches.

title: Langflow is Missing Ownership Verification in API Key Deletion (IDOR)
description:
**Detection Method:** Kolega.dev Deep Code Scan

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| Location | src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/api_key.py:44-53 |
| Practical Exploitability | High |
| Developer Approver | faizan@kolega.ai |

### Description
The delete_api_key_route() endpoint accepts an api_key_id path parameter and deletes it with only a generic authentication check (get_current_active_user dependency). However, the delete_api_key() CRUD function does NOT verify that the API key belongs to the

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-33053.

title: Craft CMS Vulnerable to Stored XSS in Revision Context Menu
description:
The revision/draft context menu in the element editor renders the creator’s `fullName` as raw HTML due to the 
use of `Template::raw()` combined with `Craft::t()` string interpolation. A low-privileged control panel user
(e.g., Author) can set their fullName to an XSS payload via the profile editor, then create an entry with two
saves.

If an administrator is logged in and executes a specifically crafted payload while an elevated session is active, the attacker’s account can be elevated to admin

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-33051.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

net/sched: act_gate:...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

net/sched: act_gate: snapshot parameters with RCU on replace

The gate action can be replaced while the hrtimer callback or dump path is
walking the schedule list.

Convert the parameters to an RCU-protected snapshot and swap updates under
tcf_lock, freeing the previous snapshot via call_rcu(). When REPLACE omits
the entry list, preserve the existing schedule so the effective state is
unchanged.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23245.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

perf/core: Fix refcount bug...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

perf/core: Fix refcount bug and potential UAF in perf_mmap

Syzkaller reported a refcount_t: addition on 0; use-after-free warning
in perf_mmap.

The issue is caused by a race condition between a failing mmap() setup
and a concurrent mmap() on a dependent event (e.g., using output
redirection).

In perf_mmap(), the ring_buffer (rb) is allocated and assigned to
event->rb with the mmap_mutex held. The mutex is then released to
pe

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23248.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

wifi: mac80211: bounds-check...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

wifi: mac80211: bounds-check link_id in ieee80211_ml_reconfiguration

link_id is taken from the ML Reconfiguration element (control & 0x000f),
so it can be 0..15. link_removal_timeout[] has IEEE80211_MLD_MAX_NUM_LINKS
(15) elements, so index 15 is out-of-bounds. Skip subelements with
link_id >= IEEE80211_MLD_MAX_NUM_LINKS to avoid a stack out-of-bounds
write.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23246.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

fs: ntfs3: fix infinite loop...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

fs: ntfs3: fix infinite loop in attr_load_runs_range on inconsistent metadata

We found an infinite loop bug in the ntfs3 file system that can lead to a
Denial-of-Service (DoS) condition.

A malformed NTFS image can cause an infinite loop when an attribute header
indicates an empty run list, while directory entries reference it as
containing actual data. In NTFS, setting evcn=-1 with svcn=0 is a valid way
to represent an empty

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2025-71265.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

nvme: fix memory allocation...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

nvme: fix memory allocation in nvme_pr_read_keys()

nvme_pr_read_keys() takes num_keys from userspace and uses it to
calculate the allocation size for rse via struct_size(). The upper
limit is PR_KEYS_MAX (64K).

A malicious or buggy userspace can pass a large num_keys value that
results in a 4MB allocation attempt at most, causing a warning in
the page allocator when the order exceeds MAX_PAGE_ORDER.

To fix this, use kvzalloc

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Linux kernel's nvme_pr_read_keys() function could allow a malicious or buggy userspace application to trigger excessive memory allocation, potentially leading to system instability, denial of service, or resource exhaustion.
recommended_actions: Immediately update affected Linux kernel versions to include the patch resolving CVE-2026-23244.
Conduct a review of systems and applications that rely on NVMe functionality to ensure proper resource allocation and handling.
Implement monitoring and alerting for unusual memory allocation patterns to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title: LibreChat version 0.8.1-rc2 uses the same JWT secret for the user session mechanism and RAG API...
description: LibreChat version 0.8.1-rc2 uses the same JWT secret for the user session mechanism and RAG API which compromises the service-level authentication of the RAG API.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The use of the same JWT secret for both user session management and RAG API authentication introduces a significant vulnerability. If the JWT secret is compromised, attackers could impersonate users or gain unauthorized access to the RAG API, potentially leading to data breaches, service disruptions, or unauthorized data manipulation.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the application to use separate and securely generated JWT secrets for user session management and RAG API authentication.
Rotate the compromised JWT secret and invalidate all existing tokens to prevent unauthorized access.
Conduct a security audit to identify and address any other potential vulnerabilities in the authentication mechanisms.

title: In LibreChat 0.8.1-rc2, a logged-in user obtains a JWT for both the LibreChat API and the RAG API.
description: In LibreChat 0.8.1-rc2, a logged-in user obtains a JWT for both the LibreChat API and the RAG API.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-33265.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

fs: ntfs3: check return...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

fs: ntfs3: check return value of indx_find to avoid infinite loop

We found an infinite loop bug in the ntfs3 file system that can lead to a
Denial-of-Service (DoS) condition.

A malformed dentry in the ntfs3 filesystem can cause the kernel to hang
during the lookup operations. By setting the HAS_SUB_NODE flag in an
INDEX_ENTRY within a directory's INDEX_ALLOCATION block and manipulating the
VCN pointer, an attacker can cause t

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2025-71266.

title: CVE-2026-27237 - Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (
description: Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that could be abused by a low-privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts into vulnerable form fields. Malicious JavaScript may be executed in a victim’s browser when they browse to the page containing the vulnerable field.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-27237.

title: CVE-2026-27236 - Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (
description: Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that could be abused by a low-privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts into vulnerable form fields. Malicious JavaScript may be executed in a victim’s browser when they browse to the page containing the vulnerable field.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The stored XSS vulnerability in Adobe Experience Manager could allow attackers to inject malicious scripts into form fields, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or the execution of unauthorized actions in the context of affected users' browsers.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Adobe Experience Manager to the latest patched version that addresses CVE-2026-27236.
Implement input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data to mitigate XSS vulnerabilities.
Conduct a thorough security assessment of web applications to identify and address other potential vulnerabilities.

title: CVE-2026-27235 - Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (
description: Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that could be abused by a low-privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts into vulnerable form fields. Malicious JavaScript may be executed in a victim’s browser when they browse to the page containing the vulnerable field.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a low-privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts into form fields, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or unauthorized actions performed in the victim's browser.
recommended_actions: Update Adobe Experience Manager to the latest patched version to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement input validation and sanitization on all form fields to prevent malicious script injection.
Enable Content Security Policy (CSP) in the web application to restrict the execution of unauthorized scripts.

title: CVE-2026-2569 - The Dear Flipbook – PDF Flipbook, 3D Flipbook, PDF embed, PDF viewer plugin for WordPress is vulnera
description: The Dear Flipbook – PDF Flipbook, 3D Flipbook, PDF embed, PDF viewer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via PDF page labels in all versions up to, and including, 2.4.20 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2569.
